headline: Rockwell, SLB exit oil, gas automation JV
summary: Rockwell Automation and SLB have dissolved Sensia, their joint venture established in 2019 to provide digital automation services to the oil and gas industries. The companies announced that relevant products from Sensia have been brought back under their respective ownerships, with Rockwell Automation taking full ownership of the Process Automation Business and SLB acquiring the Lift Control, Measurement, Digital Solutions, and Edge Applications units. Both companies assured customers that services would not be affected and continuity plans are in place.
label: positive
